hypotheses.name: Multi-lineage attractor screen (T-cell + myeloid)
hypotheses.method: cycle4_immune embeddings [12,4941,512]. For T-cell TFs (RUNX3; 1/5 in-vocab), myeloid TFs (SPI1,CEBPB; 2/5), B-cell GC-TFs (BATF,BACH2,PAX5 reference): compute mean rank of TFs among all genes nearest to lineage marker centroid at each layer L0-L11. Spearman correlation rank vs layer = convergence test.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Spearman rho (mean TF rank vs layer)
hypotheses.result_value: T-cell rho=-0.543 p=0.068; Myeloid rho=-0.874 p=0.0002; B-cell GC ref rho=-0.993 p<0.000001. Onset (rank<500): T-cell L0, Myeloid L0, B-cell L3
hypotheses.next_action: Expand T-cell TF vocab coverage (FOXP3, GATA3, TBX21 absent from cycle4); try cycle1 vocab. Confirm B-cell uniqueness: GC onset L3 vs T-cell/myeloid L0 pre-wiring is novel cross-lineage finding.

hypotheses.name: BCL6 and PAX5 neighborhood characterization
hypotheses.method: cycle4_immune embeddings. For BCL6 and PAX5: find k=20 nearest neighbors at L0, L3, L6, L11. Count B-cell/T-cell/myeloid/GC-TF content in neighbors. Track rank of BCL6 and PAX5 near B-cell centroid across all 12 layers.
hypotheses.primary_metric: B-cell content in k=20 neighbors; rank near B-cell centroid
hypotheses.result_value: BCL6: 0 B-cell/GC-TF neighbors across all layers; rank near centroid 596-1159 (never converges). BCL6 neighbors=metabolic stress (NAMPT, GLUL, PFKFB3). PAX5: 1-2 B-cell neighbors from L0; rank 29-70 near centroid. PAX5 neighbors=B-cell receptors (FCRL1, CD22, VPREB3).
hypotheses.next_action: Annotate BCL6 metabolic neighborhood with GO terms. Confirm PAX5 L0 pre-wiring is biological (not random). PAX5 as B-cell master regulator pre-encoded from L0 is a strong paper claim.

hypotheses.name: TwoNN intrinsic dimensionality by layer and lineage
hypotheses.method: TwoNN estimator (Facco et al. 2017) on layer embeddings of gene subsets: B-cell markers (4 genes), T-cell markers (9 genes), myeloid markers (6 genes), immune panel (25 genes). Compute ID at each layer L0-L11. Spearman correlation ID vs layer. Compare lineages.
hypotheses.primary_metric: TwoNN intrinsic dimension; Spearman rho vs layer
hypotheses.result_value: B-cell ID: 8.16 (L0) → 5.09 (L11), rho=-0.951 p<0.0001. T-cell: no trend rho=+0.287 p=0.37. Myeloid: slight increase rho=+0.699 p=0.011. Panel: no trend rho=+0.280 p=0.38.
hypotheses.next_action: Test if B-cell ID reduction tracks with GC-TF convergence (same onset near L3?). Verify with bootstrap subsampling. TwoNN ID monotonic decrease is a novel geometric signature to add to paper.
